glosses.ru: и т. д.; и так далее

sentences.target: Je dois acheter du lait, des œufs, etc.
sentences.reading: /ʒə dwa aʃte dy lɛ, dez‿ø, ɛt‿sɛ.te.ʁa/

translations.fr: Je dois acheter du lait, des œufs, etc.
translations.ipa: /ʒə dwa aʃte dy lɛ, dez‿ø, ɛt‿sɛ.te.ʁa/
translations.en: I have to buy milk, eggs, etc.
translations.es: Tengo que comprar leche, huevos, etc.
translations.de: Ich muss Milch, Eier usw. kaufen.
translations.ru: Мне нужно купить молоко, яйца и т. д.
translations.he: אני צריך לקנות חלב, ביצים וכו׳.
translations.vi: Tôi phải mua sữa, trứng, v.v.
translations.ar: عليّ أن أشتري الحليب والبيض، إلخ.
translations.nl: Ik moet melk, eieren enz. kopen.
translations.uk: Мені треба купити молоко, яйця тощо.
translations.hi: मुझे दूध, अंडे आदि खरीदने हैं.
translations.el: Πρέπει να αγοράσω γάλα, αυγά κ.λπ.
translations.nb: Jeg må kjøpe melk, egg osv.
translations.id: Saya harus membeli susu, telur, dll.
translations.sv: Jag måste köpa mjölk, ägg osv.
translations.ro: Trebuie să cumpăr lapte, ouă etc.
translations.da: Jeg skal købe mælk, æg osv.
translations.fi: Minun pitää ostaa maitoa, munia jne.
translations.ja: 牛乳や卵などを買わなければなりません。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun (1st person singular); indexes the speaker and agrees with the verb.
Conjugated main/modal verb (present 1sg) expressing obligation; selects an infinitive complement.
Infinitive verb functioning as the complement of "dois"; denotes the action to perform.
Partitive article (contraction of de + le) introducing a mass noun.
Mass noun serving as a direct object of "acheter".
Indefinite plural article introducing another item in the same object list.
Plural noun; second direct object item coordinated in the list.
Abbreviation indicating continuation of the list; discourse marker without regular syntactic function.

sentences.target: On révise les verbes, les temps, etc.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ ʁe.viz le vɛʁb, le tɑ̃, ɛt‿sɛ.te.ʁa/

translations.fr: On révise les verbes, les temps, etc.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ ʁe.viz le vɛʁb, le tɑ̃, ɛt‿sɛ.te.ʁa/
translations.es: Estamos repasando los verbos, los tiempos verbales, etc.
translations.it: Ripassiamo i verbi, i tempi verbali, ecc.
translations.ko: 우리는 동사와 시제 등을 복습하고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在复习动词、时态等。
translations.yue: 我哋喺度溫習動詞、時態等。
translations.ru: Мы повторяем глаголы, времена и т. д.
translations.pt: Estamos revisando os verbos, os tempos verbais etc.
translations.he: אנחנו חוזרים על פעלים, זמנים וכו׳.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang ôn lại động từ, thì, v.v.
translations.nl: We herhalen de werkwoorden, de tijden enz.
translations.hu: Átismételjük az igéket, az igeidőket stb.
translations.hi: हम क्रियाएँ, काल आदि दोहरा रहे हैं.
translations.id: Kami sedang mengulang kata kerja, kala, dll.
translations.ja: 動詞や時制などを復習しています。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun (impersonal/colloquial); triggers 3rd person singular verb agreement.
Conjugated main verb (present 3sg) taking a direct-object list.
Definite article (plural) introducing the noun "verbes".
Plural common noun; first direct object item of "révise".
Definite article (plural) introducing the noun "temps".
Common noun (here plural in meaning); second direct object item in the list.
Abbreviation indicating continuation of the list; discourse marker.

sentences.target: Prends ta brosse, ton chargeur, etc.

translations.fr: Prends ta brosse, ton chargeur, etc.
translations.en: Take your brush, your charger, etc.
translations.es: Llévate tu cepillo, tu cargador, etc.
translations.de: Nimm deine Bürste, dein Ladegerät usw.
translations.it: Prendi la tua spazzola, il tuo caricatore, ecc.
translations.zh-Hans: 把你的牙刷、充电器等带上。
translations.yue: 記得帶你嘅牙刷、充電器等。
translations.ru: Возьми свою щётку, зарядку и т. д.
translations.pt: Leva a tua escova, o teu carregador etc.
translations.he: קח את המברשת שלך, את המטען שלך וכו׳.
translations.vi: Mang bàn chải của bạn, sạc của bạn, v.v.
translations.nl: Neem je borstel, je oplader, enz.
translations.uk: Візьми свою щітку, зарядний пристрій тощо.
translations.hu: Vidd a kefédet, a töltődet stb.
translations.hi: अपना ब्रश, अपना चार्जर आदि ले लो.
translations.pl: Weź swoją szczotkę, swoją ładowarkę itd.
translations.el: Πάρε τη βούρτσά σου, τον φορτιστή σου κ.λπ.
translations.nb: Ta med børsten din, laderen din osv.
translations.id: Bawa sikat gigi dan charger-mu, dll.
translations.sv: Ta med din borste, din laddare osv.
translations.ro: Ia peria ta, încărcătorul tău etc.
translations.da: Tag din børste, din oplader osv.
translations.ja: 歯ブラシや充電器などを持っていって。

tokens.explanation: Imperative (2sg) main verb issuing a command; selects direct objects in a list.
Possessive determiner (2sg), feminine singular; modifies "brosse".
Common noun; first direct object of "Prends".
Possessive determiner (2sg), masculine singular; modifies "chargeur".
Common noun; second direct object in the coordinated list.
Abbreviation signaling that further items are implied; discourse-level marker.

sentences.target: Nous devons appeler Paul, envoyer les mails, etc.
sentences.reading: /nu də.vɔ̃ za.ple pɔl, ɑ̃.vwa.je lez mɛl, ɛt‿sɛ.te.ʁa/

translations.fr: Nous devons appeler Paul, envoyer les mails, etc.
translations.ipa: /nu də.vɔ̃ za.ple pɔl, ɑ̃.vwa.je lez mɛl, ɛt‿sɛ.te.ʁa/
translations.en: We have to call Paul, send the emails, etc.
translations.es: Tenemos que llamar a Paul, enviar los correos, etc.
translations.de: Wir müssen Paul anrufen, die E-Mails schicken usw.
translations.it: Dobbiamo chiamare Paul, inviare le email, ecc.
translations.ko: 폴에게 전화하기, 이메일 보내기 등을 해야 해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们得给保罗打电话、发邮件等。
translations.yue: 我哋要打畀保羅、發電郵等。
translations.ru: Нам нужно позвонить Полу, отправить письма и т. д.
translations.pt: Temos que ligar para Paul, enviar os e-mails etc.
translations.he: אנחנו צריכים להתקשר לפול, לשלוח את המיילים וכו׳.
translations.tr: Paul’u aramamız, e-postaları göndermemiz vb. gerekiyor.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi phải gọi cho Paul, gửi các email, v.v.
translations.ar: علينا أن نتصل بباول، ونرسل الرسائل الإلكترونية، إلخ.
translations.nl: We moeten Paul bellen, de e-mails versturen, enz.
translations.uk: Нам потрібно подзвонити Полу, надіслати листи тощо.
translations.hu: Felhívnunk kell Pault, el kell küldenünk az e-maileket stb.
translations.hi: हमें पॉल को फोन करना है, ईमेल भेजने हैं, आदि.
translations.pl: Musimy zadzwonić do Paula, wysłać e-maile itd.
translations.el: Πρέπει να καλέσουμε τον Πολ, να στείλουμε τα email κ.λπ.
translations.nb: Vi må ringe Paul, sende e-postene osv.
translations.id: Kita harus menelepon Paul, mengirim email, dll.
translations.sv: Vi måste ringa Paul, skicka mejlen osv.
translations.ro: Trebuie să-l sunăm pe Paul, să trimitem emailurile etc.
translations.cs: Musíme zavolat Paulovi, poslat e-maily atd.
translations.da: Vi skal ringe til Paul, sende e-mails osv.
translations.fi: Meidän pitää soittaa Paulille, lähettää sähköpostit jne.
translations.ja: ポールに電話したり、メールを送ったりしなければなりません。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun (1st person plural); agrees with the verb.
Conjugated main/modal verb (present 1pl) expressing obligation; selects infinitive complements.
Infinitive complement of "devons"; takes "Paul" as its direct object.
Proper noun; direct object of the infinitive "appeler".
Second infinitive complement of "devons" within a coordinated list.
Definite article (plural) introducing "mails".
Plural noun; direct object of the infinitive "envoyer".
Abbreviation indicating that the list continues; discourse marker.
